title: Destiny Pixelmon
body:
Welcome to Destiny Pixelmon! We are a server with a different feel! Come and have fun for hours playing the real Pixelmon, which reminds you of the true essence of games.
This modpack adds a simple way to play at Destiny Pixelmon, comming with all the newest updates of the modpack to make your experience the best as possible.


Pixelmon, powered by: https://pixelmonmod.com/
